li.text: Kurin HAR config tweaks
(restart required for the settings to take effect)
Guns shoot faster, harder, and have more armor pen
Sword
Set the crafting requirement for the Ceremonial sword (default: 10)
Polearm
Set the crafting requirement for the polearm (default: 14)
- Add Electricity as research requirement to existing 'electric' kurin tailor benches.\n- Add 'manual' tailor benches.\n- Set bench cost to match the vanilla tailoring and electric bench.

li.label: Metal recipes at the Machining table

li.text: Recipes that require Metal instead of Fabric will go to the machining table instead of the kurin tailor table
Advanced clothing
Casual hair pin
Replaces the fabric/leather with metal for the casual hair pin
Set the mental break threshold offset when wearing the pin (default -0.06 = -6%)
Casual wear

This piece of wear doesn't actually have a stat associated with it so i just picked one you can add if you want (default 0)\nI don't know exactly how this value works in-game so experiment and see what works
Hoodie

This piece of wear doesn't actually have a stat associated with it so i just picked one you can add if you want (default 0)\nFor the hoodie i picked carrying capacity because of deep pockets you can put stuff in
Hot pants

This piece of wear doesn't actually have a stat associated with it so i just picked one you can add if you want (default 0)\nFor the hot pants picked plant work speed just for fun, seemed somewhat fitting
One piece dress
The trade price improvement for the one piece dress (default 0.1).\nKeep in mind that by default, kurin alrady have a negotiation ability of 1.3 and sell price factor of 1.2
Open back knit
The social impact improvement for the open back knit.\nDefault kurin already has a factor of 1.2 applied (default 0.1)
Open shoulder knit
The Negotation ability improvement for the open shoulder knit.\nDefault kurin already has a factor of 1.3 applied (default 0.1)
Pajamas
Rest rate multiplier for the pajamas (default 0.1)
Fine clothing
Black Dress
Social impact modifier for the black dress (default 0.25)
Trade price modifier for the black dress (default 0.4)
Black Wedding Dress
Social impact modifier for the black wedding dress (default 0.25)
Trade price modifier for the black wedding dress (default 0.4)
Chinese Wedding Dress
Social impact modifier for the chinese wedding dress (default 0.25)
Trade price modifier for the chinese wedding dress (default 0.4)
Cute Dress
Move speed modifier for the cute dress (default 0.4)
The cute dress does not have this value by default but i added it as an alternative to move speed (default 0)
The cute dress does not have this value by default but i added it as an alternative to move speed (default 0)
Gothic Dress
Psychic sensitivy modifier for the gothic dress (default 0.25)
Entropy recovery rate for the gothic dress (default 0.03)
Gothic Hair Pin
Psychic sensitivy modifier for the gothic hair pin (default 0.15)
Jumpsuit
Work speed modifier for the work jumpsuit (default 0.1)
Luxery Dress
Social impact modifier for the luxery dress (default 0.4)
Trade price modifier for the luxery dress (default 0.25)
Nun Dress
Tend speed modifier for the nun dress (default 0.2)
Tend quality modifier for the nun dress (default 0.1)
Research Clothing
Hacking speed modifier for the research clothing (default 0.3)
Research speed modifier for the research clothing (default 0.2)
Seductive Black Dress
Negotiation ability modifier for the seductive black dress (default 0.3)
Seductive White Dress
Negotiation ability modifier for the seductive white dress (default 0.3)
Traditional Fancy Dress
social impact modifier for the traditional fancy dress (default 0.15)
Negotiation ability modifier for the traditional fancy dress (default 0.15)
Trade improvement modifier for the traditional fancy dress (default 0.15)
Traditional Hair Pin
Trade improvement modifier for the traditional hair pin (default 0.15)
Traditional Luxery Dress
Social impact modifier for the traditional luxery dress (default 0.3)
Traditional Simple Dress
Trade price modifier for the traditional simple dress (default 0.3)
Traditional Luxury Dress
Social impact modifier for the white wedding dress (default 0.4)
Trade price modifier for the white wedding dress (default 0.25)
Basic Combat
Body armor
Set the material multiplier for the body armor ratings (default 1.00 = 100%)
Set the amount of work needed to create this item.\nFormula: value / 60 = work (default 12000). for reference the flak vest has a default of 8000
Advanced Combat
Armored gothic dress

li.label: Add Middle layer on armored gothic dress

li.text: By default the armored dress only has OnSkin which allows you to wear body armor over this. Adding the Middle layer will also make it occuppy the same layer as the body armor.
Set the weight of the armored gothic dress (default 0.40)

li.label: Stuff effect multiplier armor gothic dress

li.text: The Armor multiplier for the fabric when creating the dress (default 0.55)
Set the psychic sensitivity offset of the armored gothic dress (default 0.25)
Set the speed offset of the armored gothic dress (default -0.20)
Bikini armor
Set the mass of the Bikini Armor (default 0.40)
Bikini armor Headgear
Set the mass of the Bikini Armor Headgear (default 0.20)\nFor reference, the Flak helmet has a weight of 1.20.

li.label: Stuff effect multiplier Bikini armor Headgear

li.text: Set the effect the material has when creating the Bikini armor headgear (default 0.30)\n For reference, the flak helmet has a value of 0.70 but it does not have the equipment offsets.

li.label: Melee hit chance offset Bikini armor headgear

li.text: The melee hit chance offset for the Bikini armor headgear (default 1.0)

li.label: Melee dodge chance offset Bikini armor headgear

li.text: The Melee dodge chance offset for the Bikini armor headgear (default 2.0)
The move speed offset for the Bikini armor headgear (default 0.1)
Black Wedding Headwear
Set the mass of the Black wedding headwear (default 0.20)

li.label: Stuff effect multiplier Black wedding headwear

li.text: Set the effect the material has when creating the Black wedding headwear (default 0.30)

li.label: Melee hit chance offset Black wedding headwear

li.text: The melee hit chance offset for the Black wedding headwear (default 1.0)

li.label: Melee dodge chance offset Black wedding headwear

li.text: The Melee dodge chance offset for the Black wedding headwear (default 2.0)
The move speed offset for the Black wedding headwear (default 0.1)
Chinese Wedding Headwear
Set the mass of the Chinese wedding headwear (default 0.20)

li.label: Stuff effect multiplier Chinese wedding headwear

li.text: Set the effect the material has when creating Chinese wedding headwear (default 0.30)

li.label: Melee hit chance offset Chinese wedding headwear

li.text: The melee hit chance offset for the Chinese wedding headwear (default 1.0)

li.label: Melee dodge chance offset Chinese wedding headwear

li.text: The Melee dodge chance offset for the Chinese wedding headwear (default 2.0)
The move speed offset for the Chinese wedding headwear (default 0.1)
White Wedding Headwear
Set the mass of the White wedding headwear (default 0.20)

li.label: Stuff effect multiplier White wedding headwear

li.text: Set the effect the material has when creating White wedding headwear (default 0.30)

li.label: Melee hit chance offset White wedding headwear

li.text: The melee hit chance offset for the White wedding headwear (default 1.0)

li.label: Melee dodge chance offset White wedding headwear

li.text: The Melee dodge chance offset for the White wedding headwear (default 2.0)
The move speed offset for the White wedding headwear (default 0.1)
Military Uniform
Set the mass of the Military uniform (default 0.40)
Set the effect the material has when creating the Military uniform (default 0.30)

li.label: Shooting accuracy offset for the Military uniform

li.text: The shooting accuracy offset for the Military uniform (default 2.0)
Military Helmet
Set the mass of the Military helmet (default 0.20)
Set the effect the material has when creating the Military helmet (default 0.45)

li.label: Aming time offset for the Military helmet

li.text: The Aiming time offset for the Military helmet (default -0.1)
Republic armor
Sets the redfox and waterfox armor to be made at the Fabrication bench instead of the default tailor bench.
Redfox armor
Set the mass of the Redfox armor (default 1.0)
Melee hit chance offset for the Redfox armor (default 3.0)
The shooting accuracy offset for the Redfox armor (default 3.0)
The dodge chance offset for the Redfox armor (default 9.0)
The move speed offset for the Redfox armor (default 0.40)
The vaccuum resistance offset for the Redfox armor (default 0.30)
Redfox helmet
Set the mass of the Redfox helmet (default 1.5)
Melee hit chance offset for the Redfox armor (default 2.0)
The aiming time offset for the Redfox helmet (default -0.2)
The dodge chance offset for the Redfox helmet (default 3.0)
The move speed offset for the Redfox helmet (default 0.1)
The vaccuum resistance offset for the Redfox helmet (default 0.65)
Waterfox Armor
Set the mass of the Waterfox armor (default 0.20)
Global work speed offset for the Waterfox armor (default 0.3)

li.label: Remove flower requirement for T3 research
Change the tech level for the regular apparel to medieval

li.text: Change the tech level for the basic, advanced, and fine clothing to medieval instead of industrial
Changes the recipe user from the machining table to the smithing table (not a gun)

li.label: Removes the additional gunsmithing requirement for kurin weapons

li.text: Change research requirements for the polearm to be advanced combat and long blades as it is no energy weapon

li.label: Removes the T0 clothing requirement for Waterfox, it already has T4

li.text: Research to unlock synthread producing flower (default 800 Industrial)
Basic clothing research base cost (default 400 Industrial)
Advanced clothing research base cost (default 800 Industrial)
Fine clothing research base cost (default 1200 Industrial)
Republic armor replicas research base cost (default 1600 Spacer)

Moves the reseach requirement from Fabrication to Marine Armor for republic armor.\nThis would make it so that you first need marine armor and then you can research this.\nI recommend setting this one to true and lowering the research base cost as marine armor already has a base cost of a few thousand and this is more a Kurin specific extension of that research than something entirely different.
Basic combat research base cost (default 800 Industrial)
Remove the smithing requirement for Basic combat and add a smithing requirement for the surigum and a flak requirement for the body armor
Advanced combat research base cost (default 1200 Industrial)

li.label: Add flak armor to most apparel of advanced combat

li.text: Currently there is no additional research requirement for advanced combat, making it pretty cheap compared to the other researches.\nThis adds flak as an additional requirement for most of the clothing in advanced combat.\n(When enabling this option i would recommend lowering the base cost as this would double the research requirement(this + flak))
Spacer combat research base cost (default 1600 Spacer)
Mechtech research base cost (default 400 Spacer)
Ancient defenses research base cost (default 400 Medieval)
